highlights: E2E backoffice software for Broker Dealers: compliance, broker operations, reporting.
Multitenancy SaaS with microservices hosted on Azure.
100+ repositories, mostly microservices written in Go
Vertis: digital and radio advertisement sales — functional analysis, UX/UI, full stack.
Sentinel: service to read abuse-report emails from ISP users and apply penalties and filters to illegal network traffic.
Backoffice systems with PHP, Laravel, MySQL, JavaScript, and related technologies.
Customer and supplier communication, payroll, taxes, legal communications.
Software requirements, data flow optimization, production and accounting statistics.
